name: Facet POP
description: The Facet POP does operations to make points ve shared between multiple primitives, or create new points so that the points are not shared. Unique Points will create new points so that each vertex of each primitive does not shared a point with any other vertex. (exception: on closed line strips the first vertex and the last vertex refer to the same point, by definition) Consolidate Points will potentially reduce the number of points by combining points that are within a specified distance tolerance into one point. Then multiple vertices may refer to each point, i.e. "share" a point. Cusp Polygon will look at all edges between polygons, and if the adjacent two faces to an edge are not aligned within a specified angle tolerance, it will make the edge point unique. You may follow the Facet POP with a [[Normal POP]] which computes the point or vertex normals, giving the surfaces a faceted loop or not.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this POP to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: Angle
parameters.label: Angle
parameters.description: The threshold angle between faces above which the shared edge vertices don't share points.

parameters.name: Distance
parameters.label: Distance
parameters.description: Sets the maximum distance between points when consolidating points.

parameters.name: Max Tries
parameters.label: Max Tries
parameters.description: Max number of iterations when trying to consolidate points, in case the target point has already been consolidated.

parameters.name: Remove Degenerate
parameters.label: Remove Degenerate
parameters.description: Remove primitives where consecutive vertices reference the same point.

parameters.name: Remove Unused Points
parameters.label: Remove Unused Points
parameters.description: Removes unused points not referenced by primitives.

parameters.name: Voxels Grid Resolution
parameters.label: Voxels Grid Resolution
parameters.description: Defines the voxel grid resolution used when consolidating points via the Spatial Grid Per Voxel method.

parameters.name: Specify Bounding Box
parameters.label: Specify Bounding Box
parameters.description: Enable specifying a bounding box when consolidating points with the spacial grid per voxel method.

parameters.name: Bounding Box
parameters.label: Bounding Box
parameters.description: SOP to use as bounding box when specifying a bounding box when consolidating points with the Spatial Grid method.

parameters.name: Compute Point Normals
parameters.label: Compute Point Normals
parameters.description: Whether to compute point normals as a post operation.

parameters.name: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.label: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.description: Enable copying the point count and topology information held on the GPU to the CPU.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Facet_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
